title: Maxx Hanging Filled Face Punch Bag with Hook Bracket and Gloves Set
features: Durable Construction: Made from high-quality Syntek leather with a non-tear lining.
Enhanced Training: Anatomically designed for realistic contact practice.
Weather Resistant: Features a waterproof outer and tear-resistant lining.
Secure and Stable: Equipped with a strong Nylostrap and includes a heavy-duty steel hook.
Customizable Workout: Fill to your desired weight; includes matching resilient and comfortable gloves.
description: Maxx Pro Boxing Gear Introducing the Maxx Pro Boxing Gear Hanging Torso Punch Bag, the ultimate tool to enhance your training routine and refine your combat skills for boxing, MMA, and other contact sports. Shaped like a dummy, this hybrid body punch bag is designed to allow fighters to practice sparring and improve clinch, knee, and body kick techniques. Key Features: High-Quality Syntek Leather: Constructed from durable Syntek leather with a non-tear lining to withstand serious impact. Anatomically Designed: Perfectly shaped for enhanced training and contact practice, ensuring effective and realistic drills. Waterproof and Tear-Resistant: Features a waterproof outer and a tear-resistant lining for long-lasting use, even in the most intense training sessions. Secure Nylon Built Strap: Equipped with a durable Nylostrap that ensures an unbreakable hold, no matter what you throw at it. Matching Bag Gloves: Comes complete with matching gloves that are both resilient and comfortable, offering the ultimate upper-body workout. Heavy-Duty Hook: The robust punch bag can be securely hung using the included steel hook, providing a stable training platform. Personalizable Weight: You can fill the bag to your desired weight, customizing it to suit your workout needs. Ideal Dimensions: Measuring 4ft with a unique shape, this bag is perfect for improving stamina, coordination, and strength. Anatomically engineered and the perfect size for coaching and flawless in-ring technique, the Maxx Pro Boxing Gear Hanging Torso Punch Bag is the ideal choice for fighters looking to take their training to the next level. Train like a professional and elevate your combat skills with this essential training tool.
